creator: freebsd-2024@virtual-estates.net
text:
Comment on attachment 245783
Patch for lepton

I don't think, being abandoned upstream is in itself a sufficient reason for removal.

If the port continues to build normally, why purge it? Someone somewhere may be relying on it...

Maybe, once that new version -- implemented in Rust -- is properly ported and proven to be a complete (and superior) replacement, an argument could be made, that there is no need for TWO such programs.
